member.name: T:DurableTask.PostgreSQL.PostgreSqlOrchestrationService
member.summary: PostgreSQL implementation of IOrchestrationService for DurableTask Framework. Provides durable workflow orchestration using PostgreSQL 17+ as the backend.

member.name: T:DurableTask.PostgreSQL.PostgreSqlOrchestrationServiceSettings
member.summary: Configuration settings for PostgreSqlOrchestrationService.

member.name: P:DurableTask.PostgreSQL.PostgreSqlOrchestrationServiceSettings.ConnectionString
member.summary: PostgreSQL connection string.

member.name: P:DurableTask.PostgreSQL.PostgreSqlOrchestrationServiceSettings.TaskHubName
member.summary: Task hub name. If null, will use current database user.

member.name: P:DurableTask.PostgreSQL.PostgreSqlOrchestrationServiceSettings.SchemaName
member.summary: Schema name for DurableTask tables. Default: "dt"

member.name: P:DurableTask.PostgreSQL.PostgreSqlOrchestrationServiceSettings.MaxConcurrentOrchestrations
member.summary: Maximum number of work items to fetch per poll. Default: 10

member.name: P:DurableTask.PostgreSQL.PostgreSqlOrchestrationServiceSettings.MaxConcurrentActivities
member.summary: Maximum number of activity tasks to fetch per poll. Default: 10

member.name: P:DurableTask.PostgreSQL.PostgreSqlOrchestrationServiceSettings.LockRenewalInterval
member.summary: Lock renewal interval (heartbeat). Default: 30 seconds

member.name: P:DurableTask.PostgreSQL.PostgreSqlOrchestrationServiceSettings.LockTimeout
member.summary: Lock timeout duration. Default: 5 minutes

member.name: P:DurableTask.PostgreSQL.PostgreSqlOrchestrationServiceSettings.WorkItemPollingInterval
member.summary: Work item polling interval. Default: 1 second

member.name: P:DurableTask.PostgreSQL.PostgreSqlOrchestrationServiceSettings.AutoDeploySchema
member.summary: Enable automatic schema deployment on startup. Default: false (manual deployment recommended)

member.name: P:DurableTask.PostgreSQL.PostgreSqlOrchestrationServiceSettings.WorkerId
member.summary: Worker identifier for lock ownership. Default: Machine name + Process ID

member.name: T:DurableTask.PostgreSQL.PostgreSqlTypes
member.summary: Composite type mappings for PostgreSQL DurableTask provider. These correspond to types defined in logic.postgresql.sql

member.name: T:DurableTask.PostgreSQL.PostgreSqlTypes.OrchestrationLockResult
member.summary: Result from dt.lock_next_orchestration function. Maps to dt.orchestration_lock_result composite type.

member.name: T:DurableTask.PostgreSQL.PostgreSqlTypes.TaskLockResult
member.summary: Task lock result from dt.lock_next_task function.

member.name: T:DurableTask.PostgreSQL.PostgreSqlTypes.HistoryEvent
member.summary: History event for bulk insert. Maps to dt.history_event composite type.

member.name: T:DurableTask.PostgreSQL.PostgreSqlTypes.OrchestrationEvent
member.summary: Orchestration event for bulk insert. Maps to dt.orchestration_event composite type.

member.name: T:DurableTask.PostgreSQL.PostgreSqlTypes.TaskEvent
member.summary: Task event for bulk insert. Maps to dt.task_event composite type.

member.name: T:DurableTask.PostgreSQL.PostgreSqlTypes.TaskResult
member.summary: Task result for task completion. Maps to dt.task_result composite type.

member.name: T:DurableTask.PostgreSQL.PostgreSqlTypes.MessageId
member.summary: Message ID for event deletion. Maps to dt.message_id composite type.

member.name: T:DurableTask.PostgreSQL.ServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for registering PostgreSqlOrchestrationService in DI.

member.name: M:DurableTask.PostgreSQL.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddDurableTaskPostgreSql(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.String,System.Action{DurableTask.PostgreSQL.PostgreSqlOrchestrationServiceSettings})
member.summary: Adds PostgreSqlOrchestrationService as the DurableTask backend.

member.name: M:DurableTask.PostgreSQL.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddDurableTaskPostgreSql(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,DurableTask.PostgreSQL.PostgreSqlOrchestrationServiceSettings)
member.summary: Adds PostgreSqlOrchestrationService with settings object.
